XCONTSIG_LIVE_SIGNATURE_INFO

Stores the Xbox Live signature returned by the XLocateLiveSignature function. 

typedef struct{
    DWORD SignatureFlags;
    BYTE LiveSignature[XCALCSIG_LIVE_SIGNATURE_SIZE];
} XCONTSIG_LIVE_SIGNATURE_INFO, *PXCONTSIG_LIVE_SIGNATURE_INFO;

Members

SignatureFlags
This member is always zero.
LiveSignature[XCALCSIG_LIVE_SIGNATURE_SIZE]
Buffer that contains the Xbox Live signature. This data can be passed as the pbOnlineSignature parameter to the XOnlineSignatureVerify function.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xbox.h, for include use Xtl.h.

See Also

Storage Overview, Content Signatures | Storage Structures | XLocateLiveSignature, XOnlineSignatureVerify
